title: Help needed to find missing woman
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Pacaltsdorp police are...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Pacaltsdorp police are asking the public's help in the search for Candice Clark (43), who was reported as missing on Friday 21 March.

According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, reports available indicate Clark was last seen on Friday 7 March, when she was walking along Mission Street in Pacaltsdorp.


> She was dressed in blue jeans and a green jersey with grey tekkies at the time of the disappearance.


Anyone with information that can assist police in locating Clark is asked to contact the investigation officer, Warrant Officer William Van Schalkwyk, at the Pacaltsdorp Detectives on 044 803 9130 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
